input.command:
cd /Users/exampleuser/workspaces/workspace-nexus/nexus-gateway
go test -race -count=1 -timeout 60s -run 'TestBuildStreamPreHookCallback' ./packages/ai-gateway/internal/ingress/proxy/ 2>&1 | tail -10
echo "---"
git add packages/ai-gateway/internal/ingress/proxy/proxy_cache.go \
        packages/ai-gateway/internal/ingress/proxy/sse_prehook.go \
        packages/ai-gateway/internal/ingress/proxy/sse_prehook_test.go
bash scripts/check-go-coverage.sh --staged 2>&1 | tail -5
